innovation_1.name: 基于三层角信号分解与几何特征的光场材质分类方法
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that traditional EPI assumptions fail under specific physical boundaries, providing a rigorous root cause analysis for light field estimation bottlenecks.

innovation_2.name: 面向多域光场数据的领域平衡采样与统一深度估计训练策略
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a domain-balanced sampling and unified training strategy to achieve robust cross-domain light field depth estimation.

innovation_3.name: 光场EPI假设失效的物理边界界定与根因分析
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate a novel material classification approach that leverages three-layer angular signal decomposition alongside geometric features to achieve superior performance.
